packages/web/src/app.css::fragment 2::wi.line: The state-dot now expects a glyph — check where the ○/•/✓ text gets set, since this only styles it.

packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx::BookPage..title: packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx :: BookPage
packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx::BookPage..line: Check how lastStoryConfig tracks and restores the prior chapter config across view toggles.

packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx::BookPage..line: Check the unseen-vs-seen branch and the remaining count math.

packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx::BookPage..title: packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx :: BookPage
packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx::BookPage..line: Check the aria-pressed values and disabled states tie to grouping and reordering.

scores.faithfulnessWhy: The diff shows startResize's implementation being added, but the comment above indicates the resizable outline drag behavior already exists conceptually (documented pre-existing behavior), and the surrounding useBookKeymap/onMove/onUp logic suggests this is completing or wiring up an existing function rather than introducing a brand-new feature.

packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx::BookPage..title: packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx :: BookPage.startResize.onUp
packages/web/src/BookPage.tsx::BookPage..line: Check the localStorage write and the pointer listener cleanup on pointerup.

packages/web/src/OrderOptionsControl.tsx.line: New fileView prop gates the summary text, both select disables, and the note's nested ternary.

packages/web/src/OutlineSidebar.tsx::::d.title: packages/web/src/OutlineSidebar.tsx
packages/web/src/OutlineSidebar.tsx::::d.line: STATE_GLYPH is keyed by ChunkReviewState — check that type is imported or in scope here.

packages/web/src/RowView.tsx::RowView::1.line: The old ✓ span is gone; check the button's stopPropagation against the row's article-select.

packages/web/src/OutlineSidebar.tsx::Out.line: New width prop drives nav style; check callers pass it and how the glyph sits with aria-hidden.

summary.selfPreferenceNote: single-family judge (Claude sonnet) vs Claude-opus generator: self-preference caveat applies (judge tier deliberately below the generator to blunt it, not remove it).
